title: Cosmos Vowel Synth — formant synthesizer that sings A-E-I-O-U vowels
title_vi: Cosmos Vowel Synth — synth formant hát nguyên âm A-E-I-O-U, phát tiếng thật
summary: A self-contained formant/vowel synthesizer: a buzzy sawtooth oscillator (glottal buzz source) is voiced through 3 parallel BiquadFilter bandpass nodes tuned to standard formant frequencies (F1/F2/F3) so it literally sings vowels A-E-I-O-U. An XY pad morphs between vowels (X axis) and pitch (Y axis). A glowing mouth shape opens/closes with F1 and a spectrum panel shows the 3 formant peaks migrating as you drag. It PLAYS REAL SOUND via the Web Audio API on user interaction. Zero dependencies, single self-contained HTML file. In ?auto=1 mode it is completely silent — a seeded deterministic path morphs vowels on a little melody, the formant peaks and mouth shape animate, and the vowel label shows the current vowel; the loop is seamless and frame 0 is mid-morph.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html in a browser and CLICK or DRAG on the XY pad to HEAR it sing — audio requires a user gesture; drag horizontally to morph the vowel (A-E-I-O-U), drag vertically to change pitch; it sustains a continuously sung tone that changes smoothly as you drag. KEY TECHNIQUES: synthesis = a sawtooth OscillatorNode (glottal buzz) split into 3 parallel BiquadFilter nodes set to type='bandpass' each tuned to a standard formant frequency (F1/F2/F3), each with its own GainNode, all summed into a VCA GainNode → master GainNode ~0.18 → DynamicsCompressorNode → destination; morphing the X position interpolates bandpass center frequencies between adjacent vowel presets using setTargetAtTime ramps for click-free transitions; pitch from Y maps to a minor-pentatonic scale via setTargetAtTime; the oscillator starts once on the first pointerdown and a VCA ramps up/down to gate the tone. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 is SILENT and window.__seek(t) gives a deterministic seamless visual. TUNE: F1/F2/F3 formant tables, pitch scale, LOOP length, Q values on bandpass filters, VCA ramp time constants.
summary_vi: Synth formant tự chứa: sóng cưa (sawtooth) qua 3 bộ lọc bandpass song song được chỉnh theo tần số formant chuẩn (F1/F2/F3) nên hát được nguyên âm A-E-I-O-U. Kéo XY để đổi nguyên âm + cao độ; miệng phát sáng mở/khép theo F1 và bảng phổ hiện 3 đỉnh formant chuyển dịch. Không thư viện; mở ra bấm/kéo chuột là PHÁT TIẾNG thật qua Web Audio API. Auto=1 câm hoàn toàn — demo hình vòng lặp seeded.
notes: Mở ra bấm/kéo chuột vào XY pad để nghe nó hát nguyên âm thật; auto=1 thì câm, chỉ hiện hình.
